pr.title: Add baseline and depth recurrence submissions (1xH100 20min runs)

output.summary: Reproduces the 10L Int5/Muon/BigramHash baseline and experiments with 4-layer depth recurrence looped 3x with per-loop LoRA under mixed int5/int6 QAT on 1xH100.
output.valOnlyReasoning: No validation-only training; standard training regime with validation used for evaluation.
techniques: BigramHash embeddings with SWA on Muon optimizer
Depth recurrence with shared layers + per-loop LoRA adaptations
